title: CodeGraph CLI JSON envelope
description: Every CodeGraph CLI --json output carries `schemaVersion` + `tool` at the top level so downstream consumers can branch on the version and verify the tool. Tool-specific payload fields appear alongside.

schemaVersion.description: Envelope contract version. Bumped on backwards-incompatible changes to the envelope itself (not to a specific tool's payload).

tool.description: Name of the CLI subcommand that produced this output (status, search, callers, callees, impact, affected, inventory, files).
